title: ITC Mission Sunehra Kal Organises Water Mela In Bhadrachalam
description: A key highlight of the programme was the felicitation of farmers who demonstrated leadership in water conservation and sustainable agriculture. Madakam Rama Laxmamma, Kunjay Nageshwarao and Chekka Narasimharao were honoured as Best Catchment Farmers for 2025–26.
